en: This was supposed to be a sketch about me just getting a package, and that guy was supposed to come in
and act like just a regular, ordinary UPS man.
Instead, he acted like a raving jackass.
He was totally unrealistic. Can we get Naomi, our casting person in here, please?
Oh, good. Naomi, there you are. Why did you cast that actor to play the messenger?
I mean, he was horrible. I'm sorry, Conan.
I tried to do the best job that I could,
but I guess my best wasn't good enough.
Why have I failed where others have succeeded?
